title: ferray-numpy-interop: only supports 1D arrays for Arrow and Polars
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

Arrow and Polars conversions (ToArrow, FromArrow, ToPolars, FromPolars) only work on Array1<T>. There's no support for 2D or ND arrays. NumPy interop supports Ix1, Ix2, and IxDyn. For Arrow: multi-dimensional data is typically represented as FixedSizeList or nested arrays. For Polars: DataFrames contain multiple 1D Series, not 2D arrays. But at minimum, converting a 2D ferray array to/from a list of Arrow arrays or a Polars DataFrame (one column per axis-1 slice) would improve usability. The 1D limitation is the biggest usability gap for data pipeline interop.
